title: Woman charged in Hagan Brits murder appears in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Zenia Frans (40) appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 28 August, in connection with the murder of Asla Park teenager, Hagan Brits (17).","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Zenia Frans (40) appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 28 August, in connection with the murder of Asla Park teenager, Hagan Brits (17)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brits was fatally stabbed in the upper leg in the early hours of Sunday 24 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His family had found him, covered in blood and lying in Gubayo Street, Asla Park, near their home, and rushed him to Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital where he was declared dead at 02:00.","html":"His family had found him, covered in blood and lying in Gubayo Street, Asla Park, near their home, and rushed him to Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital where he was declared dead at 02:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KwaNonqaba Police Station spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp said Frans was arrested on Wednesday 27 August.","html":"KwaNonqaba Police Station spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp said Frans was arrested on Wednesday 27 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She appeared in court today where the matter was postponed to next Thursday, 4 September for a formal bail application.","html":"She appeared in court today where the matter was postponed to next Thursday, 4 September for a formal bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman arrested for Hagan’s murder","Teen (17) murdered in Asla Park"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Woman charged in Hagan Brits murder appears in court
